heading: Sale of waste paper and condemned furniture
label: 6516 Sale of waste paper and condemned furniture
text: It shall be the duty of the Secretary and Sergeant at Arms of the Senate to cause to be sold all waste paper and useless documents and condemned furniture that may accumulate, in their respective departments or offices, under the direction of the Committee on Rules and Administration of the Senate and cover the proceeds thereof into the Treasury.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 117 of this title

L. 104–186
